title: Software Update - DFU - Software Update screen
scenario: Verify that pairing a headset on outdated firmware and navigating to Device Settings > Software Update displays the update message and an active Continue button.
steps: 1. Pair and connect a headset with outdated firmware.
2. Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
expected: The Software Update screen displays the message "An update is available for your device. The update takes a few minutes to complete. Let's get started" and an active Continue button.
